title: Portfolio Website
description: A modern, data-driven React portfolio with polished navigation, reusable components, and recruiter-focused content architecture.

title: Travel Planner
description: Trip planning interface for comparing destinations, budgets, itineraries, and saved travel preferences.

title: Backend APIs Toolkit
description: A collection of REST API patterns covering authentication boundaries, validation, logging, and database-backed resources.

title: Security Lab Notes
description: Hands-on security exercises documenting network scanning, threat modeling, secure coding, and defensive analysis.

title: Mini Database Engine
description: Course project implementing core database concepts including storage, indexing, query operations, and persistence.

title: Operating Systems Simulator
description: Simulation of process scheduling, memory management, synchronization, and OS resource coordination.

title: Embedded Controller
description: Microcontroller-based control system with sensor input, actuator output, and timing-sensitive logic.

title: Computer Architecture Modules
description: Digital architecture exercises covering datapaths, control units, instruction execution, and low-level system behavior.
